entities.name: Target customer profile
entities.context: Framework defining ideal customers for Careerspan based on their characteristics and concerns

entities.name: Corporate decision-makers
entities.context: Primary customer persona - stakeholders who evaluate vendors based on practical implementation concerns

entities.name: Time to value
entities.context: Key metric that target customers prioritize - speed of achieving initial outcomes

entities.name: Onboarding
entities.context: Process concern for customers - clarity around steps and effort required on their side

entities.name: Value-for-price perception
entities.context: Customer concern about receiving substantive value relative to cost paid

relationships.context: Corporate decision-makers are the primary persona within the target customer profile
Decision-makers prioritize speed of initial outcomes as a key evaluation criterion
Decision-makers want clarity on onboarding effort and implementation complexity
Decision-makers need to feel they are getting substantive value for the price paid
